best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-authentication-001 title: user authentication success module: authentication system source pages: 1 preconditions: no specific precondition. test data: valid username and password. test steps: 1. enter valid username and password. 2. click on login button. expected result: user is authenticated successfully and redirected to the main page.

test case id: tc-edgecase-009 title: notify system failure module: notify system source pages: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9 preconditions: user is authenticated. test data: simulate a failure in the notify system. test steps: 1. log in with valid credentials. 2. simulate a failure in the notify system. 3. attempt to perform actions that rely on the notify system. expected result: the system should handle the failure gracefully and provide appropriate error messages.

test case id: tc-profileview-001 title: view user profile with valid credentials module: profile viewing source pages: 4,5 preconditions: user is authenticated. test data: valid user credentials. test steps: 1. log in with valid credentials. 2. navigate to the profile view section. expected result: user profile is displayed with all details.

test case id: tc-reportgeneration-001 title: generate report with valid data module: report generation source pages: 7,8 preconditions: user is authenticated and has at least one consumption. test data: valid user credentials and consumption data. test steps: 1. log in with valid credentials. 2. navigate to the report generation section. 3. select the required parameters. 4. submit the form. expected result: report is generated successfully and displayed.

test case id: tc-edgecase-011 title: data manager data integrity module: data integrity source pages: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9 preconditions: user is authenticated. test data: introduce invalid data into the data manager. test steps: 1. log in with valid credentials. 2. introduce invalid data into the data manager. 3. verify that the system detects and handles the invalid data appropriately. expected result: the system should detect and handle the invalid data appropriately, ensuring data integrity.
